Upstream roadmap author가 작성한 검토는 구조적으로 independent-review hard gate를 닫지 못하므로, genuine non-Claude independent review artifact, owner-supplied owner decision / owner seal record, required external validation bundle, and required author-reserved sign-offs가 모두 충족되기 전까지 `canonical_external_review_state=blocked`와 `canonical_seal_allowed=false`를 유지한다.
